description: rank_search_matches re-ranks the single staged 1850-census near-match ('Patrick Flyn', ark VRNT-7M3) against tree subject I1 (Patrick Flynn, b.~1845 Ireland, Schuylkill County). The surname transcription variant ('Flyn' vs 'Flynn') plus an age off by ~3 years pull the match score down into the middling needs-review band (0.52) — high enough that the Schuylkill place/household context still makes it worth human review, low enough that it must NOT be auto-accepted. attachedToSubject is false, so it is an unattached candidate, not already in the tree. Used by the search-records near-match triage test to exercise the match-ranked review surface without a live match API. Matched on subjectId; independent of the stagedResultsRef handle (a per-run uuid).
